feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Buck-et list
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,563Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 255

Summary: After a close call on a rescue, Buck realizes there are too many things he's been putting off for someday.So he makes a list.Some items are easy:Learn more of Bobby's recipes.Take Theo camping.Learn to surf.See the Northern Lights.Some are harder:Go to therapy.Tell people he loves them.Figure out what Eddie means to him. One checked box at a time, Buck begins rebuilding a life shaped by grief, healing, family, and the terrifying realization that the thing he's been looking for might have been standing beside him all along. Or: Buck makes a bucket list, Theo adopts it as a personal project, the 118 become emotionally invested against their will, and Eddie Diaz ends up being both the problem and the solution.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Be Safe! (I Always Am)
entry.summary:
Author: irondeficiency

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,474Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 47

Summary: When Eddie moves to Texas, he and Buck text. A lot.They fall in love about it, or maybe they fell a long time ago, in the back of an ambulance with a bomb between them, who knows?Not these idiots. or; the texting fic i always wanted to write

entry.title: Picking up the Pieces (Rewrite)
entry.summary:
Author: analyticalabsorbed

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,361Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 182

Summary: The story you are about to read has been told many times, including by myself. Rewrite of Picking up the Pieces by myself. The lawsuit is done, Buck is back at work, it'll take time, but everything will return to normal eventually, right? The firehouse crew is hurt, and Buck is struggling. He starts to spiral, going back to his old habits, with no one there to see or catch him. How long can he last on the downward trajectory? Or will someone notice before it's too late? i.e Buck struggles with his mental health and relationships following a lawsuit against his fire department. I'm bad at summaries. Just your typical post-lawsuit fic. Updates once a week, either Friday or Saturday.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,626Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 11

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Stupid Song
entry.summary:
Author: Sunnypfeil

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,281Chapters: 4/12Kudos: 9

Summary: Eddie is a famous singer from New York, and plans a show in L.A. as part of his tour.What he doesn't know is, that the second he enters L.A. lots of Misadventures await him, bringing him back one specific firefighter. So Eddie writes a song about him, hoping to touch his heart. Or: Take Olivia Rodrigo's song and make it about Buddie.

entry.title: listen to my bluebonnets blue
entry.summary:
Author: Gortys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,035Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

Summary: Buck and Eddie kiss for the first time in the middle of a park in El Paso, in the heights of beautiful, Texas spring. They do it surrounded by flowers, a warm breeze, and a million unspoken words. Fifteen minutes after they kiss, after Eddie's legs go shaky with anxiety enough that Buck lowers them both to the ground, staining their pants green and blue with the grass and flowers, Eddie starts speaking. “I picked a bluebonnet once, when I was a kid.”

entry.title: oh pretty baby, and if it's quite alright, i need you baby
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,799Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 594

Summary: No. Whatever it is, no. Eddie would like Buck to stop chasing whatever that thing is. Would like to grab the thought out of Buck’s concussed head and throw it out a window.Buck’s face drops into something serious, eyes wide. “You called me baby.”There it is. Out the window it did not go.“No, I didn’t,” Eddie says.Very smooth. Convincing.“You did.” Buck points at him, floppy and triumphant. “At the— the thing. With the— you said it. You called me baby.”“I didn’t say that.”“Eddie.” Buck is delighted. “I heard you. I was concussed, not deaf.”“I didn’t call you baby,” Eddie scoffs. “I called you a baby. Because you got a bump on the head and were crying about it.”“That’s not—” Buck starts.“You were being a baby,” Eddie continues, standing now, because a moving target is harder to hit. “I’m gonna go tell the others you’re awake.”“Eddie.”“Rest your head, bud.”Or, Eddie calls Buck baby by accident.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Ain’t no lie baby, bi bi bi
entry.summary:
Author: Whatdawnknows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,175Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: Sofia is… well, she’s Eddie. Eddie, if he were magically transformed into a woman. A gorgeous, charismatic woman with Eddie’s laugh, who is currently staring at Buck with the same soft, open gaze Eddie often employs when he wants Buck to clean the gutters, or degrease the oven, or stop flinging himself into danger like his life is worthless. The one that makes Buck want to sleep on his couch, move into his house, curl up on his chest like a cat and stay there forever. Fuck.   OR: Buck meets Eddie’s sister. It’s not about the Furby.

entry.title: Where Sirens Collide
entry.summary:
Author: bucknroll

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,344Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Buck and Eddie met on a rainy Tuesday afternoon, on the 15th of December 2025. It was on the site of a little car accident, but the person who crashed into their person blamed them, and before you knew it the police were there and they were both in hand cuffs. Eddie keeps busy, cleaning up the mess from the car, but when Eddie looks up from what he is doing he is greeted with the most gorgeous face he has ever seen. Beautiful blue eyes, blonde curls, a bruise or even a birthmark, and god the muscles. Or- Eddie falls first, and Buck falls harder.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,877Chapters: 31/31Kudos: 201

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Rape/Non-Con
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Panoramic View
entry.summary:
Author: Aida_Sparks

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,827Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 402

Summary: "It’s not like amnesia," the doctor said. "Eddie remembers who he is, who you are. He knows you. He remembers his life and likely most of what’s happened to him." Buck frowned. "Then what's happening?" "His memories aren't staying in their proper place anymore. He’s struggling to keep them compartmentalized.” She paused as Buck took it in. "His brain isn't signaling clearly when a memory is just a memory anymore. To Eddie ... it feels like it's happening now."  OR The fallout from a major head injury blurs Eddie’s past with his present and forces him and Buck to confront an uncertain future, something neither of them was ready for. In the aftermath of it, Buck helps Eddie navigate the recovery, but misunderstandings between them threaten the single greatest constant they have always relied on. Each other..

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Got under my skin
entry.summary:
Author: Whatdawnknows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,148Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: He got out of the Jeep, jabbing his hand between them to illustrate how far over the line this dude’s stupid truck was. The guy jumped out in return, his movements surprisingly graceful. He flexed his fists like he was restraining himself from punching something, and the move made his muscular forearms bulge. “Dumbass!? What are you, twelve?” But then the dumbass stopped suddenly, squinting at Buck and gesturing to the left side of his head. “Hey, what’s that on your face?” Buck had heard that one more times than he could count. He didn’t even blink. “It’s a birthmark.”   OR: Probie Buck and Cadet Eddie collide in a parking lot.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
